debts_paid_installments_valid.name: debts_paid_installments_valid
debts_paid_installments_valid.value: "debts"."paid_installments" IS NULL OR "debts"."total_installments" IS NULL OR "debts"."paid_installments" <= "debts"."total_installments"

monthly_expense_entries_requires_fields_.name: monthly_expense_entries_requires_fields_when_unlinked
monthly_expense_entries_requires_fields_.value: "monthly_expense_entries"."monthly_expense_id" IS NOT NULL OR ("monthly_expense_entries"."name" IS NOT NULL AND "monthly_expense_entries"."category" IS NOT NULL AND "monthly_expense_entries"."expense_type" IS NOT NULL AND "monthly_expense_entries"."occurrence_type" IS NOT NULL)

monthly_income_entries_requires_name_cat.name: monthly_income_entries_requires_name_category_when_unlinked
monthly_income_entries_requires_name_cat.value: "monthly_income_entries"."monthly_income_id" IS NOT NULL OR ("monthly_income_entries"."name" IS NOT NULL AND "monthly_income_entries"."category" IS NOT NULL)
